title: Umami Flaky American Sausage Stir-fry
description: A post-workout meal featuring umami-flavored American sausages in a stir-fry dish that is whole30-friendly and low-carb.
instructions: Preheat a non-stick skillet over medium heat.
Add sausages and cook until they are golden brown on all sides, about 5 minutes per side. Remove from pan to plate.
In the same skillet, add shallots and garlic. Cook for 1 minute until fragrant.
Add sliced onions and bell peppers to the pan. Stir-fry for 3-4 minutes or until vegetables start to soften.
Push vegetables to one side of the skillet, then return sausages and water chestnuts to the other side. Let them cook together for another minute or so.
Drizzle a bit more oil into the skillet if needed, add a splash of soy sauce (or tamari), and stir well until evenly coated with sauce.
Remove from heat and serve hot with steamed rice or cauliflower mash as accompaniment.
